title: App Settings - General
scenario: Navigating to General from App Settings hamburger menu displays Account, About, Notifications & Device Alerts, Privacy Policy, and Licenses sections, and back returns to Poly Lens Menu
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. On the Home screen, tap the App Settings (hamburger) icon located in the top-left or top-right corner.
3. From the menu that appears, select "General".
4. Observe the new screen that opens.
5. Verify that the screen displays the following sections: Account, About, Notifications & Device Alerts, Privacy Policy, and Licenses.
6. Tap the back button (either the system back button or the in-app back arrow).
expected: The General screen displays sections for Account, About, Notifications & Device Alerts, Privacy Policy, and Licenses. After tapping back, the user returns to the Poly Lens Menu (Home screen).
